latest.title: Mangroves take power out of waves
latest.script_key: mangroves can slow waves before they hit land watch the roots in the water because mangroves create a rough barrier that breaks up wave energy they also shelter young fish and hold muddy coastlines together restoration can be infrastructure made of roots which repair story next

latest.title: Lions have dark ear marks cubs can follow
latest.script_key: lions have dark ear marks cubs can follow watch the backs of the ears because those dark marks can stand out when a lion moves through grass for cubs that contrast helps track the adult ahead the detail is small but the pride depends on staying together would you spot it

latest.title: Elephants cool blood through giant ears
latest.script_key: elephants use their ears as living radiators watch the ear surface because warm blood flows through those broad veins moving air can dump heat before it spreads through the body that is why the ears are more than decoration in hot places which giant animal trick next

latest.title: Magnets make invisible fields visible
latest.script_key: magnets can show a hidden force map watch the filings line up because each tiny piece becomes a small magnet in the field together they trace the direction of the force around the magnet the pattern is physics drawing itself which force next

latest.title: Antelopes eat grass but never the same spot twice
latest.script_key: they re not overgrazing they re rotating watch the same antelope return to yesterday s patch it s shorter now that s because they avoid spots full of parasites their hooves stirred up this keeps the whole herd healthy who else s dinner habits make better medicine than a vet

latest.title: Giraffes eat acacia thorns on purpose

latest.title: Giraffes don't stretch their necks to reach food
latest.script_key: watch the neck hinge see it it doesn t stretch up that s a myth because giraffes munch sideways not overhead they only tilt their heads down like the rest of us that s why their necks stay straight while they eat did you learn this wrong too

latest.title: Bears This scent map gives bears away
